Product Lines

Our Kart Models

Three purpose-engineered product families to match every venue type and operational requirement.

Bestseller

EV-Pro® 48

Our flagship electric rental kart — zero-emission, low-noise, high-durability. Built for indoor and outdoor venues demanding premium guest experience.

Motor
3kW Electric
Top Speed
50 km/h
Charge Time
45 mins
Runtime
2–3 hrs

DuraTrak® 270

Powered by a 270cc engine, the DuraTrak® delivers maximum thrills for outdoor attractions and high-throughput rental operations demanding raw performance.

Engine
270cc 4-Stroke
Top Speed
75 km/h
Fuel Tank
3.5 litres
Weight
135 kg

JuniorSprint® EV

Specifically engineered for young drivers aged 5–12. Speed-limited, impact-resistant bodywork, and intuitive throttle response.

Motor
1.2kW Electric
Max Speed
25 km/h
Age Range
5–12 yrs
Height Range
110–150cm

Racing

ProFrame® R32

CIK/FIA-spec racing chassis for club and national competition. Precision CNC-bent 32mm chrome-moly tubing with competition-optimized geometry.

32mm CrMo
Weight
56 kg bare
Homolog.
CIK/FIA
Classes
OK / KZ / X30

EV-Max® 72

Top Speed
